titleStmt.title: SII 22.190: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 190. (A.R. No. 190 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE PAR. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶADĒVA—16th YEAR (A.D. 1027-28)

summary.p: The inscription stops incomplete with the mention of the 16th regnal year of the king after giving at length his usual praśasti beginning with the words Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. Parts of the inscription are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—maṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyam poṟceyappāvaiyum cirt taṉiccelviyum taṉ peru—koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicartam muṭiyu māṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉnavan pakkal te
⎯⎯ ṉ vaitta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tiraṉāramun teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻu vatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷan muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum ⎯⎯ lapaḻan=tivuñ ceruviṟ cinavi Irupattorukālaraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ ṟaṉmevaruñ cān=timattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya
⎯⎯ ttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉaḷap perum pukaḻoṭum ⎯⎯ ḷamiṭavaḷaiy nāmaṇaikkoṇamum veñcilaivirar pañcappaḷḷiyum mācaṭaip paḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇkirtti Ātinakara vayil can=tiraṉ tolkulattintirarataṉai kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟai kulatanakkuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimuḷai Oṭṭa viṣaiyamum pūcurar cernalk kocalai
⎯⎯ vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟaicolait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākkit tikkaṇaikirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅko ⎯⎯ rupattaruḷi Oṇṭiṟa lāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirttat teṟipunaṟ keṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāma vicaiyottuṅkapanmaṉākiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākaiyam poru
⎯⎯ yoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum Ārttava ṉakar(n)p porttoḻil vācalil viccātirato ⎯⎯ yiṟṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻ kaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamum kalaṅkā valviṉai Ilaṅkā copamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟai punal māpappāḷamuṅ kāvalampuricai mevilimpaṅkamum viḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟuṅ kalaittakkor pukaṭṭalait takkolamum titamāvalvinai mātamaliṅkamum
⎯⎯ kalāmutir kaṭun=tiṟa lilāmuritecamun tenaṟkalar poḻil māṉak kavāramun toṭukaṭaṟ kāvaṟ kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ ko ⎯⎯ marāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu tirumuṉaippāṭi muṭiyūrnāṭṭu brahmatecam
Digital edition of SII 22.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
